_comment: Declarative plugin manifest — the skill 'dependencies'. docker/install-plugins.sh reads this at IMAGE BUILD time and bakes each entry into /opt/lanes/plugins/<name> at its pinned ref; the orchestrator loads them all and fails loud if lanes.config.json names a skill no installed plugin provides. To add a skill source: add an entry here and rerun setup.sh (rebuilds the image) — nothing else. `ref` pins a tag/branch (reproducible builds). `subpath` (optional) is the plugin's dir inside a multi-plugin marketplace repo. NOTE: this is BUILD-time config (changing it needs a rebuild), unlike lanes.config.json which is read at runtime.
